parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the user to add as a contact

parameters.description: Partial or full product name to search

parameters.name: postingDate
parameters.description: ISO date string to filter postings after this date

Get manager dashboard data (unverified products for manager category)

Get products posted by current user
